knowl:
A hiker leaves their campsite and hikes in two stages.
First, the hiker leaves the campsite on a bearing of {{b1_card}} (also written as {{b1_num}}), hiking at {{speed1}} units per hour for {{time1}} hours.
The hiker then turns and continues on a bearing of {{b2_card}} (also written as {{b2_num}}), hiking at {{speed2}} units per hour for {{time2}} hours.
Determine the distance and bearing the hiker must travel to return directly to the original campsite. Give the bearing in both forms shown above.
{{{outtro}}}
